loopkicks.name: POP 360 SHURIKEN
loopkicks.description: The Pop 360 Hyper starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside cresecent kick towards the target and lands in complete stance. This move is often the first Shuriken that trickers learn, and is vitally important for future shuriken variations.

loopkicks.name: SKIP HOOK
loopkicks.description: The skip hook is an important, fundamental move to master. All vert kicks of higher rotation that end in hook or any hyperhook variations all have the same muscle-memory as a skip hook. How your skip hook looks will determine how all your other hook kicks will look like, so master it until it looks exactly how you want it to look.

loopkicks.name: POP TORNADO
loopkicks.description: The most basic of pop kicks. The Pop Tornado starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 720

loopkicks.name: POP FEILONG

loopkicks.name: TORNADO
loopkicks.description: The Tornado is the most basic cheat kick and one of the first moves a tricker will learn. It forms the basis of all cheat kicks after.

loopkicks.name: POP 360
loopkicks.description: The Pop 360 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside crescent kick towards the target and lands in turbo (both feet). This trick is also a hyper, because Pop 180 Hook (TKT) is not often used in tricking. This trick is vitally important for Illusion Twist and other similar tricks that end in turbo.

loopkicks.name: SWING 360

loopkicks.name: CHEAT FEILONG

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 900

The Backside 900 is very important for learning similar tricks like the Cheat 900 and the Swing 900, as they have the same amount of rotation, but different take off.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 900 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in Backside stance, completes (approximately) 540° in-air rotation, finishing with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: JACKKNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 720 with a round kick executed before the hook kick or a 540 that finishes with a hook kick. Could be thought of as a Narabong all executed in the air.

loopkicks.name: WACKKNIFE
loopkicks.description: The Wackknife a cheat kick that has roughly 180° of in-air rotation, with 2-3 kicks (depending on how you count it). Basically a jackknife with no rotation.

loopkicks.name: WACKKNIFE DOUBLELEG
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife that finishes with a Doubleleg.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 DOUBLE TAI FIGHTER
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a leg grab in between both kicks.

loopkicks.name: JACKKNIFE SHURIKEN
loopkicks.description: A Jackknife that lands on the outside leg with a shuriken-style kick.

loopkicks.name: WACKKNIFE ROUND
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife with a round kick executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: CROWD AWAKENER KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Crowd Awakener that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 CROWD AWAKENER
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a Crowd Awakener / straddle / split kick executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1080
loopkicks.description: A cheat kick which leaves the ground in (approximately) backside stance, completes (roughly) 720° in-air rotation, and finishes with an outside kick (hook or crescent) at the target.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener that lands in a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 PARAKNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Parafuso that finishes with a knife.

loopkicks.name: POP 900 HYPER
loopkicks.description: The Pop 900 Hyper starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 720° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hyper’d round kick towards the target and lands on that kicking foot.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1260
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1260 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: SWING 1080
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 720° and executes an outside kick. Could be thought of as a vertical Boxcutter.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1080 DOUBLE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 that lands in hyper and executes a jackknife before landing.

loopkicks.name: POP 360 GYRO ROUND
loopkicks.description: A Pop 360 Gyro where a round kick is executed before landing, thus adding an extra 180° to the original move. The Pop 360 Gyro Round has the same amount of rotation as a Pop 900.

loopkicks.name: HURRICANE KICK
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 with 3 outside kicks.

loopkicks.name: POP 900
loopkicks.description: The Pop 900 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 720° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1260 FEILONG
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1260 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside kick and an inside kick at its target.

loopkicks.name: SWING 900 KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 540° and executes a knife.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 HYPER
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 that lands on the kicking (inside) leg in hyper.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 900 GYRO
loopkicks.description: A Backside 900 Gyro is a Backside 900 with a an extra 360° executed before landing. Can be thought of as a vertical Full Snapu.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 CROWD AWAKENER KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener that lands in a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1260 WACKKNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 that finishes with a wackknife.

loopkicks.name: POP 360 GYRO DOUBLELEG
loopkicks.description: A Pop 360 Gyro where a Doubleleg is executed before landing, thus adding an extra 180° to the original move.

loopkicks.name: 540 GYRO
loopkicks.description: A 540 with an extra twist, landing back in Complete stance.

loopkicks.name: POP 1080
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1080 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook towards the target.

loopkicks.name: PARAFUSO GYRO
loopkicks.description: A Parafuso with an extra twist, landing back in Complete. Could be thought of as a vertical Envergado Twist.

loopkicks.name: JACKKNIFE 1080
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 that starts with a Jackknife.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1260 FEILONG KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 Feilong that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1620
loopkicks.description: A vertical kick which initiates from backside stance, pops up, spins 3.5 times in the air, and round kicks at the end. Jordan Okubo first landed this trick on May 11, 2015.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1080 SHURIKEN
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1080 with an outside crescent kick that lands on the kicking foot, landing in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1260
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1260 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1080° in-air rotation, finishing with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 GYRO
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with an extra rotation, landing back in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 DOUBLE HYPER
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Double that lands on the inside leg in hyper.

loopkicks.name: POP 1440
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1440 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 DOUBLELEG TWIST
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Doubleleg with an extra twist, landing back in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1620
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1620 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1260° in-air rotation, finishing with an inside kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1440
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1440 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1080° in-air rotation, finishing with an outside kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1260 KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 that finishes with a jackknife.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1260 DOUBLELEG
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 that finishes with a parafuso/doubleleg.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 900 DOUBLE KNIFE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Double that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: BACKSIDE 1440
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1440 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook kick towards the target. Could be thought of as a vertical double full hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: 540 GYROKNIFE
loopkicks.description: A 540 Gyro that finishes with a hyperhook. Could be thought of as a vertical Snapu Hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1260 DOUBLE
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 with 2 inside kicks.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1260 HYPER
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 that lands on the kicking leg (inside leg) in Hyper.

loopkicks.name: CHEAT 1080 SHURIKEN
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 that finishes with a shuriken instead of a hook. This has the same rotational value as a Cheat 1260.

loopkicks.name: POP 1260
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1260 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: SWING 1260
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 900° and executes an inside kick. Could be thought of as a vertical Double Corkscrew Round.

loopkicks.name: Pop Feilong Knife
loopkicks.description: A Pop Feilong that finishes with a knife.

loopkicks.name: Pop Tornado
loopkicks.description: The most basic of pop kicks. The Pop Tornado starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Pop 360
loopkicks.description: The Pop 360 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside crescent kick towards the target and lands in turbo (both feet). This trick is also a hyper, because Pop 180 Hook (TKT) is not often used in tricking. This trick is vitally important for Illusion Twist and other similar tricks that end in turbo.

loopkicks.name: Pop 360 Shuriken
loopkicks.description: The Pop 360 Hyper starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 180° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside cresecent kick towards the target and lands in complete stance. This move is often the first Shuriken that trickers learn, and is vitally important for future shuriken variations.

loopkicks.name: Pop Feilong
loopkicks.description: The Pop Feilong starts off like a Pop 360 and finishes with an inside kick.

loopkicks.name: Pop 540
loopkicks.description: A Pop Tornado that lands in hyper stance and on the kicking leg.

loopkicks.name: Backside 720
loopkicks.description: The Backside 720 starts in Backside stance, rotates 180° in the air, then finishes with a hook kick. Could be thought of as a Skip Hook off of two feet.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900
loopkicks.description: The Backside 900 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 540° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target. The Backside 900 is very important for learning similar tricks like the Cheat 900 and the Swing 900, as they have the same amount of rotation, but different take off.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900 Sidekick
loopkicks.description: A Backside 900 that finishes with a sidekick instead of a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900 Feilong
loopkicks.description: A Backside 900 that finishes with a Feilong.

loopkicks.name: Pop 720
loopkicks.description: The Pop 720 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 540° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Pop 720 Double
loopkicks.description: A Pop 720 with two outside kicks. Can be thought of as a Pop 360 that rotates extra and finishes in a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Pop 360 Gyro
loopkicks.description: A Pop 360 with an extra 360° spin (aka gyro/kyro)before landing, landing back in Frontside.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900 Hyper
loopkicks.description: The Backside 900 Hyper starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 540° in the air, then lands and finishes round kick and lands on that kicking foot in hyper stance.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900 Knife
loopkicks.description: A Backside 900 Knife is a Backside 900 with a Jackknife executed, making it a Backside 1080 variation. Can be thought of as a vertical, non-flipped Full Swipeknife.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1080
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1080 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 720° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Pop 900
loopkicks.description: The Pop 900 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 720° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Pop 360 Gyro Round
loopkicks.description: A Pop 360 Gyro where a round kick is executed before landing, thus adding an extra 180° to the original move. The Pop 360 Gyro Round has the same amount of rotation as a Pop 900.

loopkicks.name: Pop 360 Gyro Doubleleg
loopkicks.description: A Pop 360 Gyro where a Doubleleg is executed before landing, thus adding an extra 180° to the original move.

loopkicks.name: Pop 900 Hyper
loopkicks.description: The Pop 900 Hyper starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 720° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hyper’d round kick towards the target and lands on that kicking foot.

loopkicks.name: Pop 1080
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1080 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Backside 900 Gyro
loopkicks.description: A Backside 900 Gyro is a Backside 900 with a an extra 360° executed before landing. Can be thought of as a vertical Full Snapu.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1080 Shuriken
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1080 with an outside crescent kick that lands on the kicking foot, landing in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1260
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1260 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1260 Feilong
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1260 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 900° in the air, then lands and finishes with an outside kick and an inside kick at its target.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1260 Wackknife
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 that finishes with a wackknife.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1260 Knife
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 that finishes with a jackknife.

loopkicks.name: Pop 1260
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1260 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1260 Feilong Knife
loopkicks.description: A Backside 1260 Feilong that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1440
loopkicks.description: The Backside 1440 starts in Backside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a hook kick towards the target. Could be thought of as a vertical double full hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Pop 1440
loopkicks.description: The Pop 1440 starts in Frontside stance, leaves the ground off of both feet, rotates 1080° in the air, then lands and finishes with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Backside 1620
loopkicks.description: A vertical kick which initiates from backside stance, pops up, spins 3.5 times in the air, and round kicks at the end. Jordan Okubo first landed this trick on May 11, 2015.

loopkicks.name: Tornado
loopkicks.description: The Tornado is the most basic cheat kick and one of the first moves a tricker will learn. It forms the basis of all cheat kicks after.

loopkicks.name: Tornado Sidekick
loopkicks.description: A Tornado with a sidekick instead of a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Tornado Double
loopkicks.description: A Tornado with two round kicks executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: Tornado Hawkeye
loopkicks.description: A Tornado with a hawkeye (inside leg executing a hook kick against the DOM)

loopkicks.name: Cheat Feilong
loopkicks.description: A Tornado where the outside (pumped, non-kicking) leg kicks like a crescent, resulting in 2 kicks.

loopkicks.name: Crowd Awakener
loopkicks.description: A Tornado with a split kick / straddle.

loopkicks.name: Cheat Double Hook
loopkicks.description: An upright Spyder with an extra hook. Could be thought of as a precursor to the Wackknife.

loopkicks.name: Parafuso
loopkicks.description: A cheat set-up into a vertical Doubleleg. The earlier the legs get together for the doubleleg, the better the aesthetic.

loopkicks.name: Parafuso Twist-Kick
loopkicks.description: A Parafuso with a Twist-Kick (round kicking going against DOM).

loopkicks.name: Parafuso Hawkeye
loopkicks.description: A Parafuso with a hawkeye executed after the doubleleg portion of the move. A hawkeye occurs when the inside (round-kicking) leg executes a hawkeye (hook kick going against the DOM).

loopkicks.name: Wackknife
loopkicks.description: The Wackknife a cheat kick that has roughly 180° of in-air rotation, with 2-3 kicks (depending on how you count it). Basically a jackknife with no rotation.

loopkicks.name: Wackknife Turbo
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife that lands in frontside on both legs (turbo).

loopkicks.name: Wackknife Round
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife with a round kick executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: Wackknife Doubleleg
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife that finishes with a Doubleleg.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 720
loopkicks.description: A cheat vert kick that takes off in (roughly) backside stance, spins 360° and finishes with an outside (hook or crescent) at the target.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 720 Double
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 720 with two “kicks”, where the first kick is just a straightened chamber.

loopkicks.name: Jackknife
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 720 with a round kick executed before the hook kick or a 540 that finishes with a hook kick. Could be thought of as a Narabong all executed in the air.

loopkicks.name: Paraknife
loopkicks.description: A Parafuso that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Twist Knife
loopkicks.description: A Jackknife with a Twist-Kick (round kicking going against DOM) instead of a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Crowd Awakener Knife
loopkicks.description: A Crowd Awakener that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Wackest Knife
loopkicks.description: A Wackknife with an extra hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Jackknife Turbo
loopkicks.description: A Jackknife that lands back in frontside on both feet like an Illusion Twist. This landing is known as “hyper” in TKT and “turbo” in mainstream.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 720 Turbo
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 720 that lands on both legs (turbo) with an outside crescent kick.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 720 Shuriken
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 720 that lands on the kicking leg in true hyper (TKT) / mega stance.

loopkicks.name: Jackknife Shuriken
loopkicks.description: A Jackknife that lands on the outside leg with a shuriken-style kick.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 900 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in Backside stance, completes (approximately) 540° in-air rotation, finishing with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Sidekick
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a sidekick rather than a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Feilong
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a Feilong executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Rodeo
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a leg grab.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Doubleleg
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 that finishes with a parafuso/doubleleg instead of a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Double
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with two inside kicks. Like a 540 late Round.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a Crowd Awakener / straddle / split kick executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Double Tai Fighter
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with a leg grab in between both kicks.

loopkicks.name: 540 Gyro
loopkicks.description: A 540 with an extra twist, landing back in Complete stance.

loopkicks.name: Parafuso Gyro
loopkicks.description: A Parafuso with an extra twist, landing back in Complete. Could be thought of as a vertical Envergado Twist.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Hyper
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 that lands on the kicking (inside) leg in hyper.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1080
loopkicks.description: A cheat kick which leaves the ground in (approximately) backside stance, completes (roughly) 720° in-air rotation, and finishes with an outside kick (hook or crescent) at the target.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1080 Double
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 that lands in hyper and executes a jackknife before landing.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Knife
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener that lands in a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Paraknife
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Parafuso that finishes with a knife.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener Knife
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Crowd Awakener that lands in a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Hurricane Kick
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 with 3 outside kicks.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Double Hyper
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Double that lands on the inside leg in hyper.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Double Knife
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Double that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: 540 Gyroknife
loopkicks.description: A 540 Gyro that finishes with a hyperhook. Could be thought of as a vertical Snapu Hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: Jackknife 1080
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 that starts with a Jackknife.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1080 Shuriken
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1080 that finishes with a shuriken instead of a hook. This has the same rotational value as a Cheat 1260.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1260
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1260 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1080° in-air rotation, finishing with a round kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1260 Double
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 with 2 inside kicks.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1260 Doubleleg
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 that finishes with a parafuso/doubleleg.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Doubleleg Twist
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 Doubleleg with an extra twist, landing back in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 900 Gyro
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 900 with an extra rotation, landing back in complete stance.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1260 Hyper
loopkicks.description: A Cheat 1260 that lands on the kicking leg (inside leg) in Hyper.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1440
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1440 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1080° in-air rotation, finishing with an outside kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Cheat 1620
loopkicks.description: The Cheat 1620 is a Cheat vert kick that leaves the ground in (approximately) Backside stance, completes (roughly) 1260° in-air rotation, finishing with an inside kick towards the target.

loopkicks.name: Skip Hook
loopkicks.description: The skip hook is an important, fundamental move to master. All vert kicks of higher rotation that end in hook or any hyperhook variations all have the same muscle-memory as a skip hook. How your skip hook looks will determine how all your other hook kicks will look like, so master it until it looks exactly how you want it to look.

loopkicks.name: Swing 360
loopkicks.description: A turbo’d skip hook basically, or a Pop 360 from a swing.

loopkicks.name: Swing 900
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 540° and executes an inside kick. Could be thought of as a vertical Corkscrew Round.

loopkicks.name: Swing 900 Sidekick
loopkicks.description: A Swing 900 with a sidekick executed instead of a round kick.

loopkicks.name: Swing 900 Knife
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 540° and executes a knife.

loopkicks.name: Swing 1080
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 720° and executes an outside kick. Could be thought of as a vertical Boxcutter.

loopkicks.name: Swing 1260
loopkicks.description: A vert kick that swings and leaves the ground in (roughly) backside, spins (roughly) 900° and executes an inside kick. Could be thought of as a vertical Double Corkscrew Round.

loopkicks.name: INWARD 360 DIVE ROLL
loopkicks.description: A "masterswing-ing" variation of the 360 Dive Roll.

loopkicks.name: CARTWHEEL
loopkicks.description: While the “gymnastics cartwheel” has a 180° stance change from start to finish, the “tricker cartwheel” goes completely side-to-side. Trickers tend to use the side-to-side cartwheel because of how the cartwheel sets for side-fulls, wraps, and masterswings.

loopkicks.name: SCOOT
loopkicks.description: The Scoot is one of the easiest “setup” moves to learn – it is one of the first learned by beginners.

loopkicks.name: KAYDEM
loopkicks.description: A Blasterscoot with no hands.

loopkicks.name: BLASTERSCOOT
loopkicks.description: An inverted roundkick with a handplant (opposite hand of kicking leg). A whole 360° is done on the floor.

loopkicks.name: SCOOT HYPER
loopkicks.description: A Scoot that lands in hyper.

loopkicks.name: MASTERSWIPE
loopkicks.description: A Masterscoot that swipes over and lands in hyper, almost like a Cartwheel that takes off of the other foot.

loopkicks.name: ROUNDOFF
loopkicks.description: A Cartwheel that lands on two feet facing the way you came from.

loopkicks.name: ONE-HANDED CARTWHEEL
loopkicks.description: A Cartwheel using the hand that’s closest to the ground.

loopkicks.name: PALMKICK
loopkicks.description: Can be thought of as a Cartwheel while only planting the hand that’s farthest from the floor and hook kicking. Like a “grounded” Skip Hook.

loopkicks.name: MASTERSCOOT
loopkicks.description: A Scoot with both hands with more emphasis on the masterswing. The Masterscoot also tends to be more inverted than the scoot, similar to a Cartwheel.

loopkicks.name: BUTTERFLY KICK SWITCH HYPERHOOK
loopkicks.description: A Butterfly Switch that lands in hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: ILLUSION TWIST
loopkicks.description: Basically a Pop 360 from a Butterfly-Kick setup. A lot of people see this as a Butterfly Twist variation, but there is actually no twist happening, hence the name “illusion”.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER SCISSOR
loopkicks.description: A GMS that finishes with a scissor.

loopkicks.name: AERIAL MEGA
loopkicks.description: An Aerial that lands in mega, or the opposite leg with a slight extra rotation. Previously called hyper aerial.

loopkicks.name: BUTTERFLY KICK SWITCH
loopkicks.description: A Butterfly Kick with a leg switch, landing on the opposite leg in complete.

loopkicks.name: BUTTERFLY KICK LATE HOOK
loopkicks.description: A Butterfly-Kick that lands in semi (landing position) with a hook executed at the end.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER SWIPEKNIFE
loopkicks.description: A GMS that finishes with a hyperhook.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER ROCKETBOI
loopkicks.description: A GMS with a Rocketboi executed before landing.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER SCOOT
loopkicks.description: A Masterscoot with no hands. Could be thought of as a darkside gainer switch.

loopkicks.name: AERIAL
loopkicks.description: A Cartwheel with no-hands. Unlike the gymnast version of the Aerial, the Tricker/Butterfly Aerial goes side to side.

loopkicks.name: WRAP ARABIAN SCISSOR
loopkicks.description: A Wrap Arabian with a scissor / step-out.

loopkicks.name: AERIAL SCISSOR
loopkicks.description: An Aerial with a scissor executed at the peak of the flip.

loopkicks.name: BUTTERFLY KICK
loopkicks.description: A move with Wushu origins. The Butterfly Kick forms the basis of the Butterfly Twist and all the variations that follow.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER SWIPE
loopkicks.description: A Masterswipe with no hands – could be thought of as an aerial that takes off of the “wrong” leg.

loopkicks.name: GRAND MASTER ARABIAN
loopkicks.description: A GMS that finishes with a front flip.

loopkicks.name: WRAP ARABIAN
loopkicks.description: A Cart Arabian that takes off from a wrap-transition or a Takuraba from wrap takeoff.

loopkicks.name: AERIAL HOOK
loopkicks.description: An Aerial that finishes with a hook.
